case_title: TARGET NATIONAL BANK VS. CECILIA V RUPERTO et al

docket_entries.description: MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF APR-16-2012 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON APR-16-2012 AT 10:45 AM IN DEPT. 504, KSENIA TSENIN. CASE DID NOT SETTLE WITH JUDGE PRO TEM. TIME ESTIMATE: 1 HOUR. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT RUPERTO, CECILIA V ORDER SETTING HEARING FOR SEP-07-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT RUPERTO, CECILIA V
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR DEC-23-2011 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK
DECLARATION OF PLTF IN LIEU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY AT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK

ZACHARY TORAN APPEARED FOR THE PLTF AND CECILIA RUPERTO APPEARED IN PRO PER. COURT TRIAL ON APR-16-2012 IS AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF AND AGAINST THE DEFT FOR $3,735.59 AND THE COMBINED INTEREST AT 10% PLUS COSTS EQUALS $294.50. TOTAL JUDGMENT IS FOR $4,030.09 - JUDGE KAY TSENIN, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT ON THE RECORD, DEPARTMENT #504
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT RUPERTO, CECILIA V

CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 3.0 HOURS
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR APR-16-2012 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON DEC-23-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100155133)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-07-2011 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT CECILIA RUPERTO'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUPERTO, CECILIA V $3,735.59 PRINCIPAL, $294.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,030.09, COSTS AND INTEREST AT 10% WERE COMBINED. SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
